item.title: The Grand Reveal! I finally fully finished my Greenleaf Willowcrest house! I can only include one video but if it\u2019s ok I\u2019ll add another post with the nighttime video. I started in July 2024 and finished two days ago. Yay! ( video )
item.description: The Grand Reveal! I finally fully finished my Greenleaf Willowcrest house! I can only include one video but if it\u2019s ok I\u2019ll add another post with the nighttime video. I started in July 2024 and finished two days ago. Yay!

item.title: New video from the Philadelphia plane crash shows a fragment flying into the head of a person who was eating. ( video )
